Name: PCB
Purpose: PCB for all the components

Name: 10 ohm resistor
Purpose: Resistor for the PCB

Name: 90 degree brackets
Purpose: mounting and assembling T slot profiles

Name: T nuts
Purpose: Mounting components to T slot profiles

Name: Screws
Purpose: M5 screws for assembling components. 10 of 16mm, 20 of 14mm, 4 of 30mm, 6 of 45mm, 6 of 65mm, 16 of 8mm. Also 10 of M2x14mm.

Name: IR2104
Purpose: IC for powering each phases mosfet

Name: Small Cap
Purpose: 0.47 uF 50V CAP

Name: LM2596
Purpose: Buck converter for supplying low voltage power to the PCB

Name: INA240
Purpose: The current amplifier to sense motor current with the shunt

Name: MOSFET
Purpose: IRF2204 mosfet for the 3 phase motor driver

Name: Large Cap
Purpose: 50V 2200uF capacitor for smoothing across power lines

Name: MT6701
Purpose: The MT6701 is the encoder to track the position of the wheel rim.

Name: STM32
Purpose: STM32 is the wheelbase PCB MCU. It runs the FFB firmware.

Name: TVS diode
Purpose: P6KE36A TVS diode for power on the PCB

Name: RP2350
Purpose: RP2350 CAN is the devboard for the wheel rim. It has CAN included.

Name: CAN resistor
Purpose: 120 ohm termination resistor for CAN bus.

Name: Shunt resistor
Purpose: Constantan wire resistor for motor current sensing. 10mr 1.5x20

Name: Push Buttons
Purpose: The pushbuttons are used for the steering rim as the controls.

Name: CAN transciever
Purpose: SN65HVD230 Can transceiver for communicating between wheelbase and wheel rim

Name: Brake resistor
Purpose: 500W 3.3R brake resistor for motor control

Name: Steering wheel
Purpose: The steering wheel rim

Name: Quick release
Purpose: Quick release for mechanically attaching the rim to the wheelbase

Name: USB C male connector
Purpose: For use in the steering rim to connect it and transfer data/power to and from the wheelbase

Name: USB C female connector
Purpose: For connecting pedals, handbrake etc to the wheelbase. They are also used for connecting the rim.

Name: PSU
Purpose: 36v 800w psu for driving the motor and electronics

Name: Hoverboard motor
Purpose: 36v 350w hoverboard motor to provide the force feedback.

Name: Steel plate
Purpose: For clamping the motor shaft and protecting the aluminium crossbeam. 3mm thick.

Name: 2040 T slot 180mm
Purpose: The crossbeam for supporting the motor shaft.

Name: T slot 200mm
Purpose: The vertical supports for 2060, PCB and PSU

Name: T slot 320mm
Purpose: Providing the outer horizontal frame
